mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT C.COMPANY_NUMBER) FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_STATE = '승인'
AND NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1

SELECT companyNumber, companyName, companyAddress, filePath, compType, compSummary, compPageDate, cat1IsHiring, cat2IsHiring, cat3IsHiring, cat4IsHiring FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.companyNumber, A.companyName, A.companyAddress, A.filePath, A.compType, A.compSummary, A.compPageDate, A.cat1IsHiring, A.cat2IsHiring, A.cat3IsHiring, A.cat4IsHiring FROM ( SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER AS companyNumber, C.COMPANY_NAME AS companyName, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS AS companyAddress, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, CI.COMP_TYPE AS compType, CI.COMP_SUMMARY AS compSummary, TO_CHAR(CI.COMP_PAGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS compPageDate, NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat1IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat2IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat3IsHiring, NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) AS cat4IsHiring FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, MIN(FILE_NUMBER) AS FILE_NUMBER FROM TBL_FILE GROUP BY COMPANY_NUMBER ) FM ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = FM.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON FM.FILE_NUMBER = F.FILE_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_STATE = '승인'
AND NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
AND NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) = 1
ORDER BY C.COMPANY_NAME ASC, C.COMPANY_NUMBER DESC
ORDER BY CI.COMP_PAGE_DATE DESC, C.COMPANY_NUMBER DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{startRow}
